metric_definitions.name: Error rate
metric_definitions.description: Percentage of requests that result in errors (4xx or 5xx) over a rolling time window.

metric_definitions.name: Request count
metric_definitions.description: Total number of requests processed by the service during the selected interval.

metric_definitions.name: Latency p95
metric_definitions.description: 95th percentile request latency measured in milliseconds.

metric_definitions.name: Conversion rate
metric_definitions.description: Ratio of converted users to total eligible users for a given funnel or experiment.

projects.name: WebApp
projects.description: Main customer-facing web application handling checkout, account management, and pricing pages.

projects.name: MarketingSite
projects.description: Public marketing website used for campaigns, landing pages, and homepage experiments.

projects.name: MobileApp
projects.description: iOS and Android mobile applications sharing a common feature flag configuration.

roles.name: Admin
roles.description: Full administrative access across all projects, environments, and settings.

roles.name: Project admin
roles.description: Manage flags, segments, and automations within assigned projects.

roles.name: Editor
roles.description: Create and modify feature flags and segments, but cannot manage members or global settings.

roles.name: Read-only
roles.description: View-only access to projects, flags, segments, and audit logs without any edit capabilities.

audit_events.summary: Segment 'beta_testers' was created with 3 initial user keys.
Feature flag 'recommendations_v2' was created in project WebApp.
Multivariate flag 'homepage_banner' was created for MarketingSite.
Added targeting rule for premium users in US/CA on 'recommendations_v2'.
Added individual user override for 'user_123' on 'recommendations_v2'.
Updated default rule to serve 'Off' for non-matching users on 'recommendations_v2'.
Feature flag 'new_checkout_flow' was created in project WebApp.
Updated rollout for 'new_checkout_flow' to 25% in Production and 100% in Staging.
Scheduled 'new_pricing_page' to turn On in Production at 2026-03-15T09:00:00.
Created kill switch automation for 'payment_api_v2' based on Error rate > 5% in Production.
Kill switch automation disabled 'payment_api_v2' in Production after Error rate exceeded 5%.
Assigned role 'Read-only' on project 'MobileApp' to member 'qa_tester'.
Adjusted Staging traffic split for 'homepage_banner' to 50/30/20.

environments.name: Production
environments.description: Customer-facing production environment for the WebApp.

environments.name: Staging
environments.description: Pre-production environment used for QA and experiments for WebApp.

environments.name: Staging
environments.description: Staging environment for marketing experiments and QA.

environments.name: Production
environments.description: Production environment for iOS and Android apps.

environments.name: Staging
environments.description: Staging environment for mobile continuous delivery and QA.

feature_flags.name: New Checkout Flow
feature_flags.description: Gradual rollout of the redesigned checkout experience in WebApp.

feature_flags.name: Recommendations V2
feature_flags.description: Next-generation recommendations engine for product listings.

feature_flags.name: Homepage Banner Test
feature_flags.description: Multivariate test for homepage hero banner messaging and color.

feature_flags.name: New Pricing Page
feature_flags.description: Controls rollout of the redesigned pricing page in WebApp.

feature_flags.name: Profile Page v3
feature_flags.description: New React-based profile page with activity timeline and badges.

feature_flags.name: Payment API v2
feature_flags.description: Routes payment traffic through the new payment API stack.

feature_flags.name: Legacy Checkout Flow
feature_flags.description: Controls access to the legacy checkout implementation.

feature_flags.name: Checkout Layout A/B Test
feature_flags.description: Multivariate test for new layout variations in the checkout funnel.

feature_flags.name: Cart Upsell Module
feature_flags.description: Enables personalized upsell recommendations in the cart.

feature_flags.name: Experimental Search
feature_flags.description: Routes a subset of traffic to the new search backend.

feature_flags.name: Dark Mode
feature_flags.description: Toggles dark mode theme for authenticated WebApp users.

feature_flags.name: Landing Page Hero Test
feature_flags.description: A/B test for landing page hero content and layout.

feature_flags.name: In-app Messages
feature_flags.description: Enables in-app marketing and lifecycle messages in the mobile app.

feature_flags.name: Mobile Checkout Flow
feature_flags.description: New mobile-optimized checkout journey for the MobileApp project.

segments.name: beta_testers
segments.description: Closed beta cohort used for early access to major WebApp features.

segments.name: internal_staff
segments.description: Internal employees identified by corporate email domains.

segments.name: marketing_power_users
segments.description: High-intent users frequently visiting campaign landing pages.

segments.name: mobile_beta
segments.description: Early access group for testing new MobileApp features.

tags.name: checkout
tags.description: Flags related to checkout and payment flows.

tags.name: pricing
tags.description: Flags that affect pricing pages or price presentation.

tags.name: account
tags.description: User account and profile related feature flags.

tags.name: experiment
tags.description: Marketing experiments and A/B test flags.

tags.name: homepage
tags.description: Flags specific to the marketing homepage experience.

tags.name: mobile
tags.description: Flags that control behavior in the MobileApp project.

flag_environment_settings.description: Production rollout at 25% On for New Checkout Flow.
Staging rollout at 100% On for New Checkout Flow.
Production targeting for premium users in US/CA; default Off.
Staging mirror of production targeting rules; default Off.
Staging multivariate experiment 50% control, 30% blue, 20% green.
New Pricing Page disabled in Production, with future scheduled enable.
New Pricing Page fully enabled in Staging.
Staging: On only for beta_testers segment; default Off.
Profile Page v3 not yet enabled in Production.
Payment API v2 disabled in Production by kill switch automation.
Payment API v2 fully enabled in Staging.

flag_variations.name: Off
flag_variations.description: Route traffic through Payment API v1.

flag_variations.name: On
flag_variations.description: Route traffic through Payment API v2.

automation_rules.name: Kill switch: Payment API v2 error rate > 5% (Production)
Warn if New Checkout Flow error rate exceeds 3% in Production
Alert if Homepage Banner p95 latency > 500ms (Staging)
Turn off Recommendations V2 if error rate > 10% (Production)
Notify if Profile Page v3 p95 latency > 800ms (Staging)
Guardrail: turn off Homepage Banner test if conversion < 0.9

scheduled_changes.description: Turn New Pricing Page On in WebApp Production at 9:00 AM on March 15, 2026.
Initial start of Homepage Banner multivariate test in MarketingSite Staging.
Increase New Checkout Flow Production rollout from 25% to 50%.
Re-enable Payment API v2 in Production after incident review.

targeting_rules.name: Premium users in US or CA (Production)
targeting_rules.description: If plan == 'premium' AND country in ['US', 'CA'], serve On; otherwise fall back to default Off.

targeting_rules.name: Premium users in US or CA (Staging)
targeting_rules.description: Mirror Production rule for QA: premium users in US/CA receive On variation.

targeting_rules.name: Beta testers segment (Staging)
targeting_rules.description: Serve Profile Page v3 On to users in the 'beta_testers' segment; all others receive Off via default rule.

targeting_rules.name: New visitors bucket (Staging)
targeting_rules.description: Attribute-based rule targeting new visitors with the blue banner variation for analysis in Staging.

targeting_rules.name: Internal staff early access (Staging)
targeting_rules.description: Ensure users in the 'internal_staff' segment always receive the New Checkout Flow in Staging.

targeting_rules.name: Internal staff canary (Production)
targeting_rules.description: Previously allowed internal staff segment to receive Payment API v2 in Production; disabled after kill switch trigger.

user_overrides.description: Explicitly force Off for user_123, even if they match premium US/CA rule.
Guarantee New Checkout Flow is On for beta tester user_001 in Staging.
Guarantee New Checkout Flow is On for beta tester user_002 in Staging.
Force blue banner variation for power user mk_user_101 in Staging.
Force green banner variation for power user mk_user_102 in Staging.
Ensure beta tester user_003 always sees Profile Page v3 in Staging.
SRE canary user for Payment API v2 in Staging.
Internal staff user override to always see Recommendations V2 in Staging.
